collision energy: with a dynamic range set to 25 seconds. The acquired mass spectra were searched using the Andromeda search engine...
fragmentation method: MS survey scan (350–1800 m/z) in Orbitrap (70,000 resolution 200 m/z, 3 × 106 AGC target and 100 ms maximal ion time) and 20 MS/MS fragments scans...
instrument: analyzed by nano-ESI-LC/MS/MS with a Q Exactive mass spectrometer...
ionization type: analyzed by nano-ESI-LC/MS/MS with a Q Exactive mass spectrometer...
labeling: we employed a stable isotope labeling with amino acids in cell culture (SILAC)-based quantitative proteomics to study the hTREM2 interactome...
